raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Legislation was unanimously approved by the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee to save off-highway vehicle competitions in California.",
    "Senate Bill 894 is the third OHV competition bill authored by Senator Brian W. Jones in three years.",
    "The previous two measures authored by Senator Jones cleared the Senate but became stalled in the Assembly.",
    "The Red Sticker program, which allowed competition off-highway vehicles to operate in California, ended last year.",
    "The end of the Red Sticker program has caused confusion regarding competition and practice riding permissions for OHV competitors.",
    "Reports indicate that some competitors are still receiving Red Stickers and permission to compete while others are not.",
    "The uncertainty caused by the end of the Red Sticker program negatively impacts local businesses, jobs, and the economy of regions that host OHV competitions.",
    "Funding for environmental work and law enforcement has been lost due to the changes in the OHV competition regulations.",
    "SB 894 aims to create a new off-highway vehicle competition program tailored for legitimate competitors only."
  ]
}
```
